gitCommit.subject: fix(ts): restore missing imports + re-apply template literal refactors (#811)
gitCommit.body:
fix(ts): restore missing imports + re-apply template literal refactors (#811)

* fix(ts): restore missing imports in VariantStockVisuals + re-apply string→template-literal refactors

VariantStockVisuals.tsx: Lovable removed Progress and calculateStockStatus imports,
causing TS2304/TS2552 regressions. Restored both imports.

Template literals: 22 sites across 22 files reverted by Lovable after PR #806 merge.
Re-applied all conversions: BOM+CSV blobs, path building, string prefixes,
cache-busting URLs, multipart joins, error messages, CSS class strings.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(perf): replace reduce with Object.fromEntries in 2 sites

- useAiRouter.ts: capabilitiesFromArray — keys.reduce → Object.fromEntries(keys.map)
- HighLimitTelemetryCard.tsx: ERROR_KINDS_FOR_STACK.reduce → Object.fromEntries spread

Both are pure 1:1 key→value mappings with no risk of key collision.
All other reduce patterns audited and left unchanged (aggregation/grouping).

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): flatMap for nested forEach+push, explicit parseInt radix

- flow-filter-types.ts: nested forEach+push → flatMap for label expansion
- 11 files: parseInt(x) → parseInt(x, 10) — explicit decimal radix prevents
  octal/hex misinterpretation in edge cases and documents intent clearly

Files: SecuritySettingsCard, PersonalizationConfig, KitIdentificationCard,
QuoteTemplateForm, DraggableQuoteItems, StepProduct, QuantityRangeComparison,
ConfirmedSummary, StockFilterToolbar, FutureStockDialog.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): Object.entries over Object.keys+lookup, nullish coalescing

Object.keys(X).map(k => X[k]) → Object.entries(X).map(([k, v]) => v):
- HighLimitTelemetryCard: OPERATION_LABEL, RANGE_LABEL, ERROR_KIND_LABEL (3 maps)
- StockHealthBreakdownDrawer: TAB_META (testid/tone/label accessed 3x)
- ZoneCommandPalette: ZONE_META (eliminates const meta = ZONE_META[zone])
- ComparisonScoreCard: weights (weight accessed 2x per iteration)
- FavoritesSortBar: LABELS

Nullish coalescing:
- LocationPanel: dims.width/height/colors !== undefined ? x : y → x ?? y
  (param typed as {width?: number} — cannot be null, ?? is equivalent)

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): replace Array.from(new Set()) with spread [...new Set()] idiom

Converts 14 occurrences across 13 files to the more concise spread syntax.
Also converts Object.keys(STATUS_CONFIG)+lookup to Object.entries in CartsListPage.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): replace .trim().length > 0 with .trim() !== '' (idiomatic)

Removes unnecessary .length property access on string emptiness checks.
Explicit string comparison is clearer and avoids the numeric comparison detour.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* fix(deps): sync package-lock.json after eslint-plugin-unused-imports install

The Lovable merge commit (da6ec36) added eslint-plugin-unused-imports to
package.json. Running npm install locally updated package-lock.json but
the file was not committed, causing all CI npm ci steps to fail with
"Missing: @types/dom-mediacapture-record@1.0.22 from lock file".

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

- useAiRouter.ts: capabilitiesFromArray — keys.reduce → Object.fromEntries(keys.map)
- HighLimitTelemetryCard.tsx: ERROR_KINDS_FOR_STACK.reduce → Object.fromEntries spread

Both are pure 1:1 key→value mappings with no risk of key collision.
All other reduce patterns audited and left unchanged (aggregation/grouping).

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): flatMap for nested forEach+push, explicit parseInt radix

- flow-filter-types.ts: nested forEach+push → flatMap for label expansion
- 11 files: parseInt(x) → parseInt(x, 10) — explicit decimal radix prevents
  octal/hex misinterpretation in edge cases and documents intent clearly

Files: SecuritySettingsCard, PersonalizationConfig, KitIdentificationCard,
QuoteTemplateForm, DraggableQuoteItems, StepProduct, QuantityRangeComparison,
ConfirmedSummary, StockFilterToolbar, FutureStockDialog.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): Object.entries over Object.keys+lookup, nullish coalescing

Object.keys(X).map(k => X[k]) → Object.entries(X).map(([k, v]) => v):
- HighLimitTelemetryCard: OPERATION_LABEL, RANGE_LABEL, ERROR_KIND_LABEL (3 maps)
- StockHealthBreakdownDrawer: TAB_META (testid/tone/label accessed 3x)
- ZoneCommandPalette: ZONE_META (eliminates const meta = ZONE_META[zone])
- ComparisonScoreCard: weights (weight accessed 2x per iteration)
- FavoritesSortBar: LABELS

Nullish coalescing:
- LocationPanel: dims.width/height/colors !== undefined ? x : y → x ?? y
  (param typed as {width?: number} — cannot be null, ?? is equivalent)

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): replace Array.from(new Set()) with spread [...new Set()] idiom

Converts 14 occurrences across 13 files to the more concise spread syntax.
Also converts Object.keys(STATUS_CONFIG)+lookup to Object.entries in CartsListPage.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* refactor(quality): replace .trim().length > 0 with .trim() !== '' (idiomatic)

Removes unnecessary .length property access on string emptiness checks.
Explicit string comparison is clearer and avoids the numeric comparison detour.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

* fix(deps): sync package-lock.json after eslint-plugin-unused-imports install

The Lovable merge commit (da6ec36) added eslint-plugin-unused-imports to
package.json. Running npm install locally updated package-lock.json but
the file was not committed, causing all CI npm ci steps to fail with
"Missing: @types/dom-mediacapture-record@1.0.22 from lock file".

https://claude.ai/code/session_015AMvYV8EoNtNpvL7jrUm83

gitCommit.subject: fix(ts): restore missing imports + re-apply template literal refactors (#811)
gitCommit.body:
fix(ts): restore missing imports + re-apply template literal refactors (#811)

* fix(ts): restore missing imports in VariantStockVisuals + re-apply string→template-literal refactors

VariantStockVisuals.tsx: Lovable removed Progress and calculateStockStatus imports,
causing TS2304/TS2552 regressions. Restored both imports.

Template literals: 22 sites across 22 files reverted by Lovable after PR #806 merge.
Re-applied all conversions: BOM+CSV blobs, path building, string prefixes,
cache-busting URLs, multipart joins, error messages, CSS class strings.

specs.title: 93 · Login com credenciais inválidas permanece em /login
94 · RLS bloqueia leitura de tabelas sensíveis para o usuário comum
clique em 'Continuar com Google' dispara authorize com provider=google
/auth/callback com code válido troca por sessão e autentica usuário
/auth/callback com ?error= mostra hint detalhado e código do erro
mostra erro para link inválido (sem token)
renderiza formulário quando há token no hash
valida força da senha e critérios em tempo real
deve realizar login com sucesso e redirecionar para a home

annotations.description: E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD ou E2E_USER_EMAIL/PASSWORD não configurados — smoke login pulado em CI sem credenciais
E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD ou E2E_USER_EMAIL/PASSWORD não configurados — smoke login pulado em CI sem credenciais

specs.title: deve bloquear acesso a rotas protegidas quando deslogado
deve exibir formulário de esqueci minha senha
